content:
# Shale Gas

**Summary**: Natural gas found in fine-grained, organic-rich sedimentary rocks.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2015-mustafa|Mustafa, 2015]] investigated the Qusaiba Shale as a primary source of unconventional shale gas in Saudi Arabia.

## Key Subtopics

- [[2015-mustafa|Mustafa, 2015]] ['lithofacies analysis', 'mineralogy', 'geomechanics']

## Methods and Approaches Used

- [[2015-mustafa|Mustafa, 2015]] ['core-analysis', 'thin-section-petrography', 'xrd', 'sem-eds']

## Key Findings Across Sources

- The Qusaiba Shale is one of the main targets for unconventional shale gas resources in Saudi Arabia. ([[2015-mustafa|Mustafa, 2015, p. 31]])

## Competing Approaches and Debates

- [[2015-mustafa|Mustafa, 2015]] Low porosity (<10%) and low permeability (micro to nanodarcy range).
